expand.description: Expand options that include additional transition details in the response.

fields.description: Details of the fields associated with the issue transition screen. Use this information to populate `fields` and `update` in a transition request.

hasScreen.description: Whether there is a screen associated with the issue transition.

id.description: The ID of the issue transition. Required when specifying a transition to undertake.

isAvailable.description: Whether the transition is available to be performed.

isConditional.description: Whether the issue has to meet criteria before the issue transition is applied.

isGlobal.description: Whether the issue transition is global, that is, the transition is applied to issues regardless of their status.

isInitial.description: Whether this is the initial issue transition for the workflow.

name.description: The name of the issue transition.

to.description: Details of the issue status after the transition.
